claim_boundary: v6.0.5 tests one immutable provisional P1+chi+sigma theory. Failure applies to that frozen theory and does not prove every possible parent theory impossible.

freeze.action: integral sqrt(-G)[kappa1 R/2-kappa0/2-Zchi(1+g sigma^2)(nabla chi)^2/2-Zsigma(nabla sigma)^2/2-A0 sigma^2/2-G0 sigma^4/4], with coefficient-locked P1 GHY completion if temporal regulation introduces endpoints
freeze.boundary_conditions: smooth normalizable fields on closed S7; compactly supported temporal variations, or fixed endpoint metric with coefficient-locked P1 GHY completion; no collar or spatial boundary term
freeze.parent_domain: M8=R_t x S7_L with round closed spatial S7
freeze.sigma_domain: real Z2-even bulk scalar on M8

selection_rationale: smallest P1 theory with a stress-carrying parent scalar and the single v6.0.3 kinetic sigma coupling; selected provisionally, not derived
